title: Bitter Fluffy Saudia Fish Stir-fry
description: An energizing saudi arabian dish featuring fish sauce and steamed to perfection for a fluffy texture, ideal as a breakfast option.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Add fish sauce and stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
Add fish fillets to the wok, season with salt and pepper, and stir-fry until browned on all sides.
Remove fish from the wok and set aside. In the same pan, add sliced green onions and minced garlic cloves. Stir-fry briefly until fragrant.
Add chopped fresh chili peppers to the pan and continue stirring for 15 seconds, then return the fish to the pan.
Sprinkle with rice vinegar, mix well, and serve hot.
